MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-20-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR TEMPORARY PROTECTIVE ORDER, PERMANENT PROTECTIVE ORDER
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Thomas Eastridge telephone number 510-530-1700 for Palintiff;
Steven S. Miyake telephone number 421-4400 for Defendants.

RULING: ARGUED; PLAINTIFF CATHY CHEUNG, TRUSTEE OF THE SURVIVING SPOUSE' MOTION FOR TEMPORARY PROTECTIVE ORDER, PERMANENT PROTECTIVE ORDER WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge Pro Tem, Conor Moore, Clerk: Rosie Noguera, Not reported. =302/jpt

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Set For Trial On Apr-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas Eastridge, Esq. of the Law Offices of Thomas Eastridge, Tel. 510.530.1700, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as the ruling of the Court. DEFENDANTS JENNY PHUNG and JEANNA SETO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiff alleges sufficient facts to support the concealment and conspiracy claims. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
